ValidationRule.description: Requires users to fill in the Calculation Review fields before moving status to 'Lease Management Review'
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( OR( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Claim_Status__c , 'Finance/Accounting Review'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Claim_Status__c , 'CTO Sign-off'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Claim_Status__c , 'Approved'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Claim_Status__c , 'Finalised')),
OR( ISBLANK( PFM_Reviewed_By__c ), ISBLANK( leaseworks__Accounting_Comment__c ), ISBLANK( leaseworks__Finance_Accounting_Review_Date__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The following fields must be completed before moving the Claim Status to 'Lease Management Review': PFM Reviewed By, PFM Comments, PFM Review Date
